400.description: Captured failed renew response when previousToken is invalid/expired

post.description: Renew an existing app session. Fresh install capture shows this can fail with AppRenewFailed when previousToken is invalid/expired; use /api/v4/auth/login for first login.

post.summary: Move one or more files/folders to another folder.
Create a folder/directory under a parent folder.
List files linked to an entity.
Link/attach an existing file to an entity such as a mutation.
Upload a file into a directory. File body is base64 in `data`.

post.description: First-login endpoint observed from a fresh iOS app install. Returns a bearer token when login succeeds. If twoFactorCodeRequired is true, an additional app flow is required and is not captured here.
